actions.description: 24th board meeting. GATE 4 APPROVED: arcade-evolution pivot ratified. 19 cycles, 5 phases. Pipeline freeze enacted. Pre-conditions (eval check, version pin, engine isolation) to begin next cycle. State.json pivot phase updated to gate-5-pipeline-freeze.

nextStep: Pre-conditions begin next cycle. Security: eval() check. R&D: version pin + engine isolation PoC. CTO signs off before Phase 1.
